channel.title: Blockchain on Frank Huang
channel.description: Recent content in Blockchain on Frank Huang

item.title: Dapps application
item.description: After exploring the most successful blockchain application – bitcoin. This time I am going to blog some application that I have seen in the real world which might be an inspiration for me to build the next project.

item.title: How I build a dApps
item.description: 在之前的一篇关于blockchain的文章中，我大致记录了一下运作原理，虽然还有很多细节没有涉及，比如安全问题（51% computing power）等。这次我想主要记录一下一些以blockchain为主题的创业公司他们如何引入类似blockchain的decentralized的概念，也同时动手试着做一个dApps(decentralized apps)。由于写这篇博客的时间临近元旦，因此有比较充足的时间做调研。 Background 互联网时代已经从单台服务器(centralized)发展到了多台服务器为中心(distributed)，现在正在向去中心化(decentralized)发展。这些过程对应着web1.0， web2.0和web3.0。在decentralized的场景下，很重要的一个特性是单点的宕机并不会导致整个应用的失效，数据还有应用的代码都是分布在每个节点上的。因此 Research part 最开始一段时间主要是研究一下decentralized的 working dApps example: - steemit - IPFS sit down and think about the same time next year, where do you see yourself be specific praise yourself finish one web app for data presentation finish a kaggle competition independently get a travel movie done with gopro in order to achieve these goal, what should I do?

item.title: My understanding on blockchain so far
item.description: Block chain has been talked a lot in the field of high tech industry. Being able to understand this decentralized technology is a plus for my career and able to implement it practicely will even better. I will talk about some information I have learnt so far in this post including the implementation of blockchain using javascript. 继上次写的一篇博文What is bitcoin mining?之后，这次继续写下关于bitcoin技术的笔记。 相信看这篇文章的读者们应该或多或少对blockchain和bitcoin有所了解了，如果这里面涉及到的一些术语觉得不理解，可以试图从reference那里找到答案，实在不行可以wiki之或者直接评论告诉我哦。那我主要在这里梳理一下blockchain到底解决什么问题和其中我认为很有趣的技术细节。 bitcoin要解决的问题是去交易的中介，类似于银行在传统的交易模型中的地位，这是一个很直观而且亟待解决的问题。这样做似乎很理想，但是有两个很明显的问题需要解决： 1. 怎么确保每一笔先后发生的交易的先后顺序？ 2. 怎么确保在A到B的交易中，A有足够的金额发给B呢？

item.title: What is bitcoin mining?
item.description: Bitcoin has been in the field for a while and friends of mine have been talking about bitcoin for a while. I have also read some of the articles talking about bitcoin, the hashing and the trustful features. But to be honest, these concepts still remain a mist for me. I decided to really figure out them in the way that I think and try to explain it as clear as possible.
